zh.Apley Castle, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Knightley於1375年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴時，他的父親Sir Richard Knightley11歲，母親Joan De Chillington7歲。他於1393年與Anne De Charlton在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿普利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1403年享年29歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Knightley was born in 1375, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Knightley, was 11 and his mother, Joan De Chillington, was 7. He married Anne De Charlton in 1393, in Apley, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1403, at the age of 29, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Knightley est né en 1375, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Knightley, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Joan De Chillington, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Anne De Charlton en 1393, à Apley, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1403, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: William Knightleyが1375年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Knightleyは11歳，母Joan De Chillingtonは7歳であった。1393年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアプリーでAnne De Charltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1403年に29歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Knightley(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Knightley(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Chillington(은)는 7세였다. 그는 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 아플리에서 Anne De Charlton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1403년 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Knightley родился в 1375 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Knightley было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Chillington, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne De Charlton в 1393 г. в местности апли, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1403 г. в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия.
